description_long: This is a modern bungalow complex set within a landscaped plot, featuring a main residential structure surrounded by lush greenery and flowering trees. The property includes a large rectangular lawn or garden area, bordered by trees and shrubs, providing a sense of privacy and tranquility. Adjacent to the main building is an outdoor pool area with sun loungers and palm trees, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The bungalow itself is single-story, with a flat roof and expansive glass windows, emphasizing open-plan living and a strong connection to the outdoors. There is a dedicated parking area with multiple cars, as well as paved walkways leading to the entrance and around the property. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a harmonious blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool area, and a dedicated parking lot. The property is surrounded by lush greenery and palm trees, creating a resort-like ambiance.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above, highlighting the landscaped garden, flowering trees, and the main building with its pool and outdoor lounge area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front approach, showcasing the pool, sun loungers, palm trees, and the main entrance with adjacent parking spaces.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the rear and side, displaying the parking lot, walkways, and the transition from the built area to the large green lawn.
description_view_3: View 3 emphasizes the expansive garden and tree-lined boundary, with the bungalow and pool area visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
